changeSet.author: olesia
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.rental_status (code, description) VALUES ('PENDING', 'Rental has been requested but not yet started'), ('ACTIVE', 'Rental is currently in progress'), ('COMPLETED', 'Rental has been successfully completed'), ('CANCELLED', 'Rental was cancelled before or during the trip');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.rental_status WHERE code IN ('PENDING', 'ACTIVE', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED');
